revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Ukraine | flag alias = Flag of Ukraine.svg | flag alias-1918 = Flag of Ukrainian People's Republic 1917.svg | flag alias-1991 = Flag of the Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic.svg | flag alias-1992 = Flag of Ukraine (1992–2006).svg | flag alias-army = Ensign of the Ukrainian Ground Forces.svg | flag alias-military=Ensign of the Ukrainian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-military=Ukrainian Armed Forces | flag alias-marines=Flag of the Ukrainian Naval Infantry.png | link alias-marines=Ukrainian Naval Infantry | link alias-army = Ukrainian Ground Forces | flag alias-coast guard=Sea Guard Ensign of Ukraine (dress).svg | link alias-coast guard=Ukrainian Sea Guard | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Ukraine.svg | flag alias-naval-1918 = Naval Ensign of Ukraine 1918 July.svg | link alias-naval = Ukrainian Navy | flag alias-air force = Ensign of the Ukrainian Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Ukrainian Air Force | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Ukraine.svg | link alias-navy = Ukrainian Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1918 | var2 = naval-1918 | var3 = 1991 | var4 = 1992 | redir1 = UKR | related1 = Zaporozhian Sich | related2 = Cossack Hetmanate | related3 = Ukrainian People's Republic | related4 = West Ukrainian People's Republic | related5 = Ukrainian People's Republic of Soviets | related6 = Ukrainian Soviet Republic | related7 = Ukrainian SSR | related8 = Carpatho-Ukraine | related9 = Ukrainian National Government </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Ukraine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Ukraine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Ukraine | flag alias = Flag of Ukraine.svg | flag alias-1918 = Flag of Ukrainian People's Republic 1917.svg | flag alias-1991 = Flag of Ukraine (1991–1992).svg | flag alias-1991b = Flag of the Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic (1949–1991).svg | flag alias-army = Ensign of the Ukrainian Ground Forces.svg | flag alias-military = Ensign of the Ukrainian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-military = Armed Forces of Ukraine | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Ukrainian Naval Infantry.png | link alias-marines = Ukrainian Marine Corps | link alias-army = Ukrainian Ground Forces | flag alias-coast guard = Sea Guard Ensign of Ukraine (dress).svg | link alias-coast guard = Ukrainian Sea Guard | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Ukraine.svg | flag alias-naval-1918 = Naval Ensign of Ukraine 1918 July.svg | link alias-naval = Ukrainian Navy | flag alias-air force = Ensign of the Ukrainian Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Ukrainian Air Force | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Ukraine.svg | link alias-navy = Ukrainian Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1918 | var2 = naval-1918 | var3 = 1991 | var4 = 1991b | redir1 = UKR | related1 = Zaporozhian Sich | related2 = Cossack Hetmanate | related3 = Ukrainian People's Republic | related4 = West Ukrainian People's Republic | related5 = Ukrainian People's Republic of Soviets | related6 = Ukrainian Soviet Republic | related7 = Ukrainian SSR | related8 = Carpatho-Ukraine | related9 = Ukrainian National Government </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
